---
title: "Editing A Bar Code Profile"
---

To edit a bar code profile:

1.  From the Hyland Experience Capture Administration user interface, click the Bar Code Profiles tab.
2.  Click the bar code profile to be edited. The Define Bar Code Profile screen is displayed.   ![Define Bar Code Profile screen](data:image/gif;base64,)
3.  Edit the settings available here for the bar code profile. For more information on these settings, see Creating a Bar Code Profile.
4.  Click the Next button to navigate to the Usage Configuration screen. The configurable settings for the profile are displayed.    ![Usage Configuration screen](data:image/gif;base64,)
5.  Edit the settings available here for the bar code profile. For more information on these settings, see Creating a Bar Code Profile.
6.  Click Save.
